title: The One Where Monica Gets a New Roomate (The Pilot-The Uncut Version)

Carol moved her

Oh God... well, it started about a half hour

Sweet 'n' Lo?- I realized that I was more turned

knew who lived here in the city.

Raindrops on roses and rabbits and

You're welcome. I remember when I first came to this city. I was

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh, it's Dr. Seuss!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: : That book got me through some tough times.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Yes, the doctors say if they remove it, he'll die.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Who's this from?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Oh, that's Ross's.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh... ...  Oh my God. He remembered.
lines.stage_direction: opens it sees it is a pin

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Remembered what?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text:
It was like months ago. We were walking by this antique store, and I saw
this pin in the window, and I told him it was just like one my grandmother had when I was
a little girl. Oh! I can't believe he remembered!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Well, sure, but can you play it on a plane?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh, it's so pretty. This must have cost him a fortune.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: I can't believe he did this.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text:
Come on, Ross? Remember back in college, when he fell in love with
Carol and bought her that ridiculously expensive crystal duck?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: What did you just say?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: ahem... um... Crystal duck.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: No, no, no.... the, um, the... 'love' part?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: F-hah.... flennin....

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh.... my God.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Oh, no-no-no-no-no....

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text:
That's good, just keep rubbing your head.
That'll turn back time.

scenes.scene_description:
[Scene: Monica and Rachel's, Monica and Phoebe are preparing for a barbecue for
Rachel's birthday.]

scenes.location: Monica and Rachel's, continued from earlier

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: I mean, this is unbelievable.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: I know. This is really, really huge.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: No it's not. It's small. It's tiny. It's petite. It's wee.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text:
Nuh-uh. I don't think any of our lives are ever gonna be the same ever
again.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: OK, is there a mute button on this woman?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: I think this is so great! I mean, you and Ross! D-did you have any idea?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text:
No! None! I mean, my first night in the city, he mentioned something
about asking me out, but nothing ever happened, so I just... : W-well, what else
did he say? I mean, does he, like, want to go out with me?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text:
Well, given that he's desperately in love with you, he probably wouldn't
mind getting a cup of coffee or something.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Ross? All this time? Well, I've got to talk to him.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: H-He's in China!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: The country.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text:
No, no, wait.  His flight doesn't leave for
another forty-five more minutes.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: What about the time difference?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: From here to the airport?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Yes!  You're never gonna make it!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Rachel, what're you gonna say to him?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: I-I-I don't know.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Well then maybe you shouldn't go.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text:
He's right, cause if you're just gonna, like, break his heart, that's the
kind of thing that can wait.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Yeah, but if it's good news, you should tell him now.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: I don't know. Maybe I'll know when I see him.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Here, look, alright, does this help?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text:
Noooo... look, all I know is that I cannot wait a week until I see him.
I mean, this is just too big. Y'know, I just, I've just gotta talk to him. I... I gotta...
OK, I'll see you later.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Rachel, I love you! Deal with me first!

scenes.scene_description: [Scene: Monica and Rachel's, continued from earlier.]

scenes.location: Monica and Rachel's, continued from earlier

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Ni-chou chi-ma!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Ross! Excuse me, pardon me, excuse me....

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Hi.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh, no, no, I don't have one. I just need to talk to my friend.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text:
No, I know, but I—he just went on. He's right there, he's got the
blue jacket on, I... can I j-just...

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text:
OK, alright, OK, um... then could you please, uh... just give him a
message for me? Please? This is very important.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Uh... I don't know.

scenes.scene_description:
[Scene: Airport, Ross has headphones on, and is listening to a 'How To Speak Chinese'
tape. Occasionally, he makes an outburst in Chinese in accordance with the tape. He is
getting on the jetway. The flight attendant is there.]

scenes.location: Joey's Bedroom, he and Melanie are in bed together

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Heh, heh. It was nothin'.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text:
Uhhh.. y'know what? Forget about me. Let's, uh... let's give
you another turn.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Sure! Why not?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: How do you mean?

scenes.scene_description: [Scene: Joey's Bedroom, he and Melanie are in bed together.]

scenes.location: Joey's Bedroom, he and Melanie are in bed together

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text:
Uh, so, uh, Rach, uh... do you wanna save this wrapping paper, I mean,
it's only a little bit torn... so are you gonna go for it with Ross or should I just throw
it out?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text:
I don't know. I don't know... I thought about it all the way there, and
I thought about it all the way back... and, uh, oh, you guys, y'know, it's Ross .
Y'know what I mean? I mean, it's Ross .

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text:
I don't know, I mean, this is just my initial gut feeling... but I'm
thinking... oh, I'm thinking it'd be really great.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text:
Oh my God, me too! Oh! Oh, we'd be like friends-in-law! Y'know what the
best part is? The best part is that you already know everything about him! I mean, it's
like starting on the fifteenth date!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text:
Yeah, but, y'know, it's... it would be like starting on the fifteenth
date.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Another good point.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text:
No, I mean, I mean, when you're at the fifteenth date, y'know, you're
already in a very relationshippy place. Y'know, it's... you're committed.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Huh?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Well, I mean, then what happens if it doesn't work out?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Why isn't it working out?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: I don't know... sometimes it doesn't.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Is he not cute enough for you?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: No!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Does he not make enough money?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: No, I'm just....

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Maybe there's someone else.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Wha...

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Is there? Is there someone else?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: No! There is.. there is noone else!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Then why the hell are you dumping my brother?!?

scenes.scene_description:
[Scene: Monica and Rachel's, Monica, Phoebe, and Rachel are there. Monica is holding
the wrapping paper from one of Rachel's gifts.]

scenes.location: Joey's Bedroom, he and Melanie are in bed together

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Hey, big...

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Shhhh!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: ...spender.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: She's still asleep.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: So how'd it go?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Oh, it was amazing. You know how you always think you're great in bed?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text:
The fact that you'd even ask that question shows how little you know
me.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text:
Well, it's like, last night, I couldn't do the thing that usually makes me
great. So I had to do all this other stuff. And the response I got... man, oh man, it was
like a ticker tape parade!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text:
Yes, I know, as it happens my room is very very close to the parade
route.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text:
It was amazing! And not just for her... uh-uh. For me, too. It's like, all
of a sudden, I'm blind. But all my other senses are heightened, y'know? It's like... I was
able to appreciate it on another level.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I didn't know you had another level.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: I know! Neither did I!

scenes.scene_description:
[Scene: Chandler and Joey's, Chandler is eating breakfast, Joey quietly opens his
bedroom door.]

scenes.location: Joey's Bedroom, he and Melanie are in bed together

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Hey, great skirt! Birthday present?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Yeah.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Oh, from who?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: From you. I exchanged the blouse you got me.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text:
Well, it's the thought. Hey, doesn't Ross's flight get in in a couple
hours? At gate 27-B?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text:
Uh, yeah. Uh, Monica, y'know, honey, I've been thinking about it and
I've decided this—this whole Ross thing, it's just not a good idea.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Oh, why?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text:
Because, I feel like I wouldn't just be going out with him. I would be
going out with all of you. Oh, and there would just be all this pressure, and I don't
wanna...

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: No, no, no, no, no, no pressure, no pressure!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Monica, nothing has even happened yet, and you're already so...

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text:
I am not 'so'! OK, I was a teensy bit weird at first, but... I'll be
good. I promise.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Who is it?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: C'mon up.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text:
Behind my brother's back?  ... is exactly the kind
of crazy thing you won't be hearing from me.

scenes.scene_description:
[Scene: Monica and Rachel's, one week later. Monica is seated, Rachel comes out of her
bedroom.]

scenes.location: Joey's Bedroom, he and Melanie are in bed together

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Seven hundred bucks!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Alright, you did it! Do we have any fruit?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text:
Man, hell of a two weeks, huh? Y'know what, though? I really feel like I
learned something.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Really? So, you're gonna stick with this 'it's all for her' thing?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text:
What, are you crazy? When a blind man gets his sight back, does he walk
around like this?
lines.stage_direction: Joey closes his eyes and walks around with arms spread.

scenes.scene_description:
[Scene: Chandler and Joey's, Chandler is seated, and the apartment is filled with
baskets of fruit. Joey enters, check in hand.]

scenes.location: Monica and Rachel's Balcony, Rachel is having drinks with her date, Carl

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: I can't believe you'd rather go out with him than me.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Would you excuse me, please? I'm trying to have a date here.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Fine, just stop thinking about me.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Can't do it, can you?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: So I'm thinking about you. So what?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: I don't get it. What do you see in this guy, anyway?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Well... he happens to be a very nice... guy....

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Rachel, come on. Give us a chance.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Ross, it's too hard.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text:
No, no, no... why, because it might get weird for everyone else? Who cares
about them. This is about us. Look, I-I've been in love with you since, like, the ninth
grade.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Ross, you're like my best friend.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: I know.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: If we broke up, and I lost you...

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Whoa, whoa, whoa. What makes you think we're gonna break up?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Well, have you been involved with someone where you haven't broken up?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text:
No. But... it only has to happen once . Look, you and I both
know we are perfect for each other, right? I mean... so, the only question is... are you
attracted to me?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: I don't know... I mean, I've never looked at you that way before.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Well, start looking.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Wow.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Right! You're right!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: You know what?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text:
I forgot... I am supposed to pick up a friend at the airport. I am so
sorry! I'm so... if you want to stay, and finish your drinks, please do....  I mean—I'm sorry. I-I-I gotta go. I'm sorry.

scenes.scene_description: [Scene: Monica and Rachel's Balcony, Rachel is having drinks with her date, Carl.]

scenes.location: Monica and Rachel's Balcony, Rachel is having drinks with her date, Carl

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text:
Excuse me, pardon me, excuse me, excuse me,
sorry. Hi.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Oh, hey, hey, I got that.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: No problem. I cannot wait for you to meet my friends.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Yeah.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: No, no, they will. I just... uh...

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Come on, they're gonna love you.

scenes.scene_description:
[Scene: Airport. Madonna's Take A Bow plays in the background as Rachel waits at
the gate with flowers.]
